headline: Cognizant (CTSH) Launches AI-Powered Agentic Retail CX in Collaboration With Google Cloud
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp. (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks with the highest upside potential. On April 22, Cognizant launched Agentic Retail CX, a specialized AI-powered contact center solution developed in collaboration with Google Cloud and built on the Gemini Enterprise platform. The offering is designed to help retailers transition from experimental AI […]
